/opt/apps/gcc/13.2.0/bin/gfortran -fPIC   -std=f2008  -O3 -funroll-all-loops -shared -Wl,-soname,libchimescalc_fortran.so -o libchimescalc_fortran.so CMakeFiles/ChimesCalc_Fortran.dir/chimesFF/api/chimescalc_F.f90.o CMakeFiles/ChimesCalc_Fortran.dir/serial_interface/api/chimescalc_serial_F.f90.o CMakeFiles/ChimesCalc_Fortran.dir/serial_interface/api/chimescalc_serial_F08.f90.o  -Wl,-rpath,/work2/09982/aoladipupo/stampede3/codes/chimes_calculator-LLfork/build: libchimescalc.so
